name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Simple row
description: Stats section with single-row metric strip for quick KPI scanning.

name: With dividers
description: Stats section with metric row separated by visible vertical dividers.

name: Cards
description: Stats section with stacked contact cards focused on address, phone, and email data.

name: With side image
description: Stats section with stats content paired with a supporting side image.

name: Primary background grid
description: Stats section with stats presented on a strong primary-background grid.
